content.text: We need a utility to check if an argument exists by name and, if provided, verify that its associated value matches the expected input.
If there are two distinct arguments that end up having the same stripped name, which one will `has_arg` return?
Since it loops using `reversed(self.arguments)`, the argument defined last in the list will be checked first and its status determined.
Thanks, this makes the codebase much cleaner!
